meta.show_status: Renewed through Season 40 (2029). ~790 episodes as of March 2026.
meta.status_update: All PENDING predictions updated with likelihood scores

predictions.title: Three-Eyed Fish
predictions.episode_name: Two Cars in Every Garage and Three Eyes on Every Fish
predictions.prediction: Blinky, a three-eyed fish, lives near Springfield's nuclear plant — a symbol of nuclear contamination of wildlife.
predictions.real_event: A three-eyed fish was caught near a nuclear power plant in Córdoba, Argentina.
predictions.verified_source: Fox News predictions list; widely reported

predictions.title: Censorship of Michelangelo's David
predictions.prediction: Springfield protests nudity in Michelangelo's David statue.
predictions.real_event: In 2016, a replica of David in a Florida school faced censorship controversy.

predictions.title: Super Bowl XXVI — Washington Redskins Win
predictions.prediction: Lisa predicts the Washington Redskins win the Super Bowl — episode aired 3 days before the game.
predictions.real_event: Washington Redskins beat the Buffalo Bills 37–24 in Super Bowl XXVI.

predictions.title: Baby Cry Translator App
predictions.episode_name: Brother, Can You Spare Two Dimes?
predictions.prediction: Homer's half-brother Herb invents a device to translate baby cries into words.
predictions.real_event: The 'Infant Cries Translator' app launched in 2016.

predictions.title: All-You-Can-Eat Restaurant Lawsuit
predictions.prediction: Homer sues an all-you-can-eat restaurant for cutting him off.
predictions.real_event: Albert Flemming of Massachusetts sued an all-you-can-eat restaurant in 2017.

predictions.title: Osaka / Superflu Pandemic
predictions.prediction: The 'Osaka Flu' arrives in Springfield via packages shipped from Japan, spreads rapidly, overwhelms hospitals, causes public panic and social breakdown.
predictions.real_event: COVID-19 pandemic (2020) — and the H3N2 'superflu' outbreak spreading through the US, UK and Japan in early 2026.
predictions.verified_source: Wikipedia; Bored Panda Jan 2026; CDC data on H3N2

predictions.title: Siegfried & Roy Tiger Attack
predictions.prediction: Parody act 'Gunter and Ernst' are mauled by their white tiger.
predictions.real_event: Roy Horn of Siegfried & Roy was attacked by white tiger Mantecore during a live show.

predictions.title: European Horse Meat Scandal
predictions.prediction: Lunch lady Doris uses 'assorted horse parts' in school meals.
predictions.real_event: European horse meat food fraud scandal — horse DNA found in products labelled as beef across the UK and Ireland.

predictions.title: Apple Autocorrect Fail
predictions.prediction: Newton device hilariously mistranslates 'Beat up Martin' as 'Eat up Martha'.
predictions.real_event: Apple Newton's autocorrect failures became a cultural meme; later informed improvements to iPhone keyboard autocorrect.

predictions.title: Smartwatches, Video Calls & Robot Librarians
predictions.prediction: Characters communicate via video screens, wear watches that function as phones, and use robot librarians — all set in the then-future of 2010.
predictions.real_event: Apple Watch (2015), FaceTime (2010), and AI/robot library systems are now mainstream.
predictions.verified_source: Fox News predictions list; TVLine; Hollywood Reporter

predictions.title: World War III Reference
predictions.prediction: Set in 2010, a British character says 'We saved your ass in World War III' to an American — implying WW3 happened between 1995–2010. No region specified.
predictions.real_event: On Feb 28, 2026, the US and Israel launched Operation Epic Fury — joint strikes on Iran killing Supreme Leader Khamenei. Iran retaliated against Gulf states. UN Security Council convened emergency session.
predictions.verified_source: TVTropes S06E19 recap; Simpsons Fandom wiki; Wikipedia 2026 Iran-US strikes; PBS News live updates Feb 28 2026
predictions.fact_check_note: WW3 in episode has no Middle East specificity. Majority of viral TikTok clips claiming Simpsons 'predicted Iran war' are AI-generated deepfakes per Boatos.org fact-check (June 2025). This entry cites only the verified S06E19 dialogue.
predictions.heating_note: CRITICAL: Russia-NATO tensions, Ukraine war escalation, Taiwan strait risks, Middle East conflicts - 50/50 major conflict chance in 2026
predictions.status_update: REACTIVATED: Original timeline expired but core prediction mirrors current crises

current_context.russia_nato_tensions: Escalating - 50/50 even chance of armed clash in 2026
current_context.ukraine_war: Ongoing with infrastructure destruction, no resolution path
current_context.taiwan_strait: Tensions rising - rated high impact contingency
current_context.expert_assessment: CFR/ICG: Multiple flashpoints creating WWIII-scale risk

predictions.title: The Shard — London Skyline
predictions.prediction: An establishing shot of London shows a pointed spire next to Big Ben that didn't exist in 1995.
predictions.real_event: The Shard skyscraper was constructed 2009–2012 in the exact position shown in the episode.

predictions.title: US Capitol Attack
predictions.prediction: Episode referenced in connection to the January 6, 2021 US Capitol attack.
predictions.real_event: January 6, 2021 storming of the US Capitol.
predictions.verified_source: Wikipedia Simpsons predictions article — noted as 'reportedly' predicted

predictions.title: FIFA Corruption Scandal
predictions.episode_name: The Twisted World of Marge Simpson
predictions.prediction: Homer is recruited as a football referee; corruption within a global sporting federation is depicted.
predictions.real_event: FIFA executives arrested in 2015 on wire fraud and racketeering charges.

predictions.title: Ebola Virus Goes Mainstream
predictions.prediction: Marge offers to read Bart a book called 'Curious George and the Ebola Virus'.
predictions.real_event: Ebola outbreak of 2014–2016 became major US news; first US cases in 2014.

predictions.title: Grease Theft Ring
predictions.prediction: Homer tries to get rich stealing restaurant grease to sell.
predictions.real_event: Real-life grease thieves were caught stealing and selling cooking grease across the US in 2013.

predictions.title: Higgs Boson / God Particle Mass
predictions.prediction: Homer writes an equation on a chalkboard that approximates the mass of the Higgs boson particle.
predictions.real_event: CERN confirmed the Higgs boson discovery in 2012. Physicist Simon Singh verified the equation was a genuine approximation.
predictions.verified_source: TVLine; Fox News; Parade; Simon Singh verification

predictions.title: 20th Century Fox Acquired by Disney
predictions.episode_name: When You Dish Upon a Star
predictions.prediction: A studio sign reads '20th Century Fox — A Division of Walt Disney Co.' played as an absurd joke.
predictions.real_event: Disney acquired 21st Century Fox for $71.3 billion, completed March 2019.

predictions.title: Donald Trump Presidency
predictions.prediction: Lisa, as US President, tells her cabinet: 'We've inherited quite a budget crunch from President Trump.'
predictions.real_event: Donald Trump elected 45th US President in 2016. Re-elected 47th President in 2024 — the exact year The Simpsons originally targeted.
predictions.verified_source: Wikipedia; Hollywood Reporter; Parade; TVLine; Al Jean confirmed on Twitter

predictions.title: Trump Budget Crisis
predictions.prediction: Lisa inherits a massive budget deficit from President Trump.
predictions.real_event: Trump's second term budget standoff led to a significant government spending crisis in early 2025.

predictions.title: Epstein Island / Elite Island Conspiracy
predictions.prediction: Homer blogs as 'Mr. X', gets kidnapped to a secret island where powerful people send those who 'know too much'. He posts: 'Attention: Some crazy creeps on an island somewhere are secretly running the world.'
predictions.real_event: Epstein Files released in 2026, naming powerful global figures and referencing private island activities. Creator Matt Groening named in related court documents.
predictions.verified_source: Euronews Feb 2026; Yahoo Entertainment Feb 2026; LADBible Feb 2026; Simpsons Fandom wiki
predictions.fact_check_note: Episode is a parody of The Prisoner (1967). No direct Epstein reference. Groening named in documents — Virginia Giuffre alleged foot massage on Epstein's plane; no further misconduct alleged. Disputed, not confirmed.

predictions.title: Smart Home / AI-Controlled House
predictions.prediction: The Simpson family moves into a fully voice-controlled smart home that eventually becomes threatening.
predictions.real_event: Amazon Alexa (2014), Google Home (2016), and Apple HomeKit now dominate — smart homes are mainstream.

predictions.title: Kamala Harris Inauguration Outfit
predictions.prediction: Lisa wears a purple pantsuit and white pearls as President.
predictions.real_event: VP Kamala Harris wore a purple pantsuit and white pearls to Biden's 2021 inauguration.
predictions.verified_source: Hollywood Reporter; Mike Scully quote: 'The color purple seemed to have been a random choice.'
predictions.fact_check_note: Producer Mike Scully said purple was random, not deliberate. Lisa always wears pearls. Viral but disputed as intentional prediction.

predictions.title: Marijuana Legalization — Canada
predictions.prediction: Canadian marijuana legalization depicted.
predictions.real_event: Canada legalized recreational marijuana October 17, 2018.

predictions.title: Farmville / Mobile Farm Games
predictions.prediction: Characters play a farming simulation game compulsively.
predictions.real_event: Farmville launched 2009 on Facebook, became one of the most addictive games in history.

predictions.title: NSA Mass Surveillance / PRISM
predictions.prediction: In the Simpsons Movie, NSA agents listen to all American phone conversations via a vast surveillance operation.
predictions.real_event: Edward Snowden revealed the NSA PRISM program in 2013 — mass surveillance of phone calls and internet data.

predictions.title: Lisa Simpson as US President
predictions.prediction: Lisa becomes the first female President of the United States.
predictions.real_event: Pending — no female US president as of 2026. Kamala Harris was first female VP. Ivanka Trump 2028 presidential run rumoured.

predictions.title: Faulty Voting Machines
predictions.prediction: Homer tries to vote for Obama but the voting machine keeps switching his vote to McCain.
predictions.real_event: Reports of touchscreen voting machine malfunctions and vote-switching in US elections 2012–2020.

predictions.title: Nobel Prize — Bengt Holmström (Economics)
predictions.prediction: Lisa's prediction sheet names Bengt R. Holmström as Nobel Prize winner in Economics.
predictions.real_event: Bengt Holmström won the Nobel Prize in Economics in 2016.

predictions.title: Lady Gaga Super Bowl Halftime Show
predictions.prediction: Lady Gaga performs an aerial stunt during a massive show, harness-suspended above the crowd.
predictions.real_event: Lady Gaga performed an aerial harness stunt at Super Bowl LI halftime show in 2017.

predictions.title: AI / Robots Replace Human Workers
predictions.prediction: Mr Burns replaces his workforce with robots. Only Homer is spared. Robots eventually turn on Burns.
predictions.real_event: From 2023 onward, companies including Google, Microsoft, Salesforce and hundreds more have replaced workers with AI. Senate report (ChatGPT-based) projected ~100 million US jobs at risk over the next decade.
predictions.verified_source: Bored Panda Jan 2026; Tyla.com; The Tab; US Senate HELP Committee report

predictions.title: Oculus / VR Headset
predictions.prediction: Character wears a VR headset resembling modern consumer VR devices.
predictions.real_event: Oculus Rift released 2016; Meta Quest, Apple Vision Pro followed.

predictions.title: FIFA Corruption — Direct Episode
predictions.episode_name: You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee
predictions.prediction: Homer is recruited as a football referee; world football federation depicted as deeply corrupt, official arrested on bribery.
predictions.real_event: FIFA executives arrested by FBI in Zurich in May 2015 on wire fraud and racketeering charges.

predictions.title: Elon Musk as Tech Billionaire / Political Figure
predictions.episode_name: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
predictions.prediction: Elon Musk appears as a tech billionaire with political influence and grandiose ambitions.
predictions.real_event: Musk's political rise through 2024–2025 — DOGE appointment, close Trump alliance, massive political spending.

predictions.title: Ivanka Trump 2028 Presidential Run
predictions.prediction: Background sticker reads 'Ivanka Trump 2028'.
predictions.real_event: Pending — Ivanka Trump has not announced a 2028 presidential run as of March 2026.

predictions.title: Lisa vs Malibu Stacy — US President Arrested
predictions.prediction: A news clipping reads 'US President Arrested'.
predictions.real_event: Donald Trump became the first US president to be criminally indicted (2023) and convicted (2024) on 34 felony counts.

predictions.title: First American Pope — Pope Leo XIV
predictions.prediction: Episode references future papal succession with American influence.
predictions.real_event: Pope Leo XIV — Robert Francis Prevost — became the first American pope in May 2025.

predictions.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup — Mexico vs Portugal Final
predictions.prediction: A soccer riot features Brazil vs Portugal — but fan interpretations now point to a possible Mexico vs Portugal World Cup 2026 final.
predictions.real_event: 2026 FIFA World Cup co-hosted by USA, Canada and Mexico. Tournament ongoing.
predictions.verified_source: Fan databases; note — exact match disputed

predictions.title: Deep Space Tourism / Civilian Space Travel
predictions.prediction: NASA sends Homer Simpson — an ordinary civilian — into space to make space travel seem appealing and accessible to the public.
predictions.real_event: Blue Origin, SpaceX and Virgin Galactic have sent civilians to space. Katy Perry flew with Blue Origin's all-female crew in 2025.
predictions.verified_source: Bored Panda Jan 2026; AOL Jan 2026; The Tab

predictions.title: Cypress Hill + London Symphony Orchestra
predictions.prediction: Cypress Hill accidentally books the London Symphony Orchestra while under the influence.
predictions.real_event: Cypress Hill performed with the LSO at Royal Albert Hall in 2024.
predictions.verified_source: Wikipedia Simpsons predictions article; Al Jean confirmed

predictions.title: Titanic Submersible / OceanGate
predictions.prediction: A private submersible malfunctions during a deep-sea expedition.
predictions.real_event: OceanGate's Titan submersible imploded near the Titanic wreck in June 2023, killing all 5 aboard.
predictions.verified_source: Parade — listed in predictions roundup; disputed as stretch

predictions.title: Coldplay Jumbotron Affair
predictions.prediction: Referenced in 2024 as a cultural prediction.
predictions.real_event: Jennifer Lopez and Ben Affleck divorce confirmed 2024; Coldplay Jumbotron viral moment (2024).

predictions.title: COVID-19 Vaccine Distribution Chaos
predictions.prediction: Episode directly addressed vaccine rollout confusion and misinformation.
predictions.real_event: US COVID-19 vaccine distribution in 2021 was chaotic, with widespread misinformation.

entries_added: SP011 — WW3/Iran War updated to reflect Feb 28 2026 strikes
entries_corrected: SP011 — removed false Middle East specificity from S06E19. Actual line: 'We saved your ass in World War III'. No region specified in episode.
entries_disputed: SP021 — Epstein island. Groening named in docs but no further misconduct alleged.
